items.definition_en: Happiness is the feeling of being very pleased and content.
items.example_en: Her happiness was clear on her wedding day.

items.definition_en: Joy is a strong feeling of great pleasure and delight.
items.example_en: Children feel joy when they play together.

items.definition_en: Love is a deep feeling of strong affection for someone or something.
items.example_en: A mother's love is very special.

items.definition_en: Hope is the feeling that something good will happen in the future.
items.example_en: She has hope that things will get better.

items.definition_en: Delight is a feeling of great pleasure and satisfaction.
items.example_en: He watched the fireworks with delight.

items.definition_en: Comfort is the feeling of being relaxed and without worry.
items.example_en: Her words gave me comfort during hard times.

items.definition_en: Pride is a feeling of pleasure when you or someone you know has done something good.
items.example_en: Parents feel pride in their children's work.

items.definition_en: Trust is the belief that someone or something is honest and reliable.
items.example_en: Good friends share a strong trust.

items.definition_en: Relief is the good feeling you have when something difficult ends.
items.example_en: He felt relief after finding his lost keys.

items.definition_en: Gratitude is a feeling of thankfulness for help or kindness.
items.example_en: She expressed gratitude for their support.

items.definition_en: Cheerfulness is the quality of being bright and happy.
items.example_en: His cheerfulness makes everyone smile.

items.definition_en: Calm is a peaceful and relaxed mental state.
items.example_en: She spoke with calm during the meeting.

items.definition_en: Confidence is the feeling that you can do something well.
items.example_en: He had confidence before the race.

items.definition_en: Admiration is a feeling of respect and pleasure for someone or something.
items.example_en: She looked at the artist with admiration.

items.definition_en: Pleasure is a feeling of enjoyment and happiness.
items.example_en: Reading gives her great pleasure.

items.definition_en: Peace is a calm and quiet state of mind or place.
items.example_en: He felt peace in the countryside.

items.definition_en: Excitement is a strong feeling of happy interest and energy.
items.example_en: There was excitement before the concert.

items.definition_en: Amusement is the feeling when something is funny or entertaining.
items.example_en: Her joke gave everyone great amusement.

items.definition_en: Affection is a gentle and loving feeling for someone.
items.example_en: The dog showed affection to its owner.

items.definition_en: Enthusiasm is a strong feeling of interest or excitement about something.
items.example_en: She spoke with great enthusiasm about her plans.
